productDisplayName: Just Natural Unisex Black Rain Jacket
description: Style noteLightweight and compact when not in use this waterproof jacket from just natural is ideal for rainy days. Elastication at the hood, sleeve and bottom hem block water completely. It has multiple pockets inside and out, to help keep your monetary essentials dry.Product DetailsBlack and khaki rainwear jacket, detachable zipper and Velcro closure in front, khaki shaped panel and print on right chest with a zippered pocket, two welt pockets with Velcro closures near front hem, raglan full sleeve, elasticated sleeve hem with Velcro to adjust Fit, paneled hood with clasp for rolling it away when not needed, adjustable and elasticated bottom and hood hem, mesh lining at chest with taped branding Material and carePolyesterMachine wash coldDo not iron Size and FitThe model (height 5'8"and shoulders 18") is wearing a size L
